skills.name: valdi-tsx

skills.description: Valdi unit and integration testing patterns

skills.name: valdi-android
skills.description: Valdi Android platform integration, Kotlin/Java bridging

skills.name: valdi-cpp-runtime
skills.description: Valdi C++ runtime internals, renderer, event system

skills.name: valdi-compiler
skills.description: Valdi compiler pipeline, TSX→native compilation

skills.name: valdi-polyglot-module
skills.description: Valdi polyglot module system: cross-platform APIs, web polyglot entry pattern, webPolyglotViews

skills.name: valdi-custom-view
skills.description: Valdi custom native view integration

skills.name: valdi-overview
skills.description: Valdi framework overview and project conventions

skills.name: valdi-async
skills.description: Valdi async lifecycle safety: CancelablePromise, registerDisposable, isDestroyed guards

skills.name: valdi-perf
skills.description: Valdi performance: viewModel identity stability, createReusableCallback, layout vs view, Style interning

skills.name: valdi-component-tests
skills.description: Valdi component test patterns: elementKeyFind, componentTypeFind, tapNodeWithKey, discriminated unions, arrays

skills.name: valdi-setup
skills.description: Valdi module setup: BUILD.bazel, valdi_module(), tsconfig, deps, ios_module_name, hot reload

skills.name: valdi-migrate
skills.description: Migrate Flutter, React, or Jetpack Compose code to Valdi — component model, lifecycle, element mapping tables

skills.name: valdi-inspect
skills.description: Inspect a live Valdi app: contexts, component trees, screenshots, heap dumps via valdi inspect CLI

skills.name: valdi-preview
skills.description: Preview a Valdi component: read its API, render it in the preview harness, inspect the view tree, and capture screenshots

skills.name: valdi-mock-breakdown
skills.description: Generate Valdi TSX from a screenshot or design mock: analyze layout, decompose into components, produce code

skills.name: valdi-mock-iterate
skills.description: Compare a design mock against a rendered Valdi screenshot and produce specific visual diff feedback

skills.name: valdi-mock-to-module
skills.description: Turn a screenshot into a running Valdi module: orchestrates breakdown, preview, and critic iteration loop

skills.name: valdi-profile
skills.description: Capture CPU profiles from a running Valdi app: diagnose slow renders, identify hot functions, understand JS thread activity

skills.name: valdi-navigation
skills.description: Multi-screen navigation: NavigationRoot, push/pop/present/dismiss, NavigationPageComponent, back button handling

skills.name: valdi-animations
skills.description: Imperative animation API: animate/animatePromise, AnimationOptions, spring physics, setStateAnimated

skills.name: valdi-gestures
skills.description: Touch and gesture handling: onTap, onDrag, onPinch, onRotate, onLongPress, TouchEvent, gesture predicates

skills.name: valdi-localization
skills.description: Internationalization: strings-en.json, Strings.d.ts generation, template variables, valdi projectsync

skills.name: valdi-error-handling
skills.description: Error handling patterns: CancelablePromise safety, HTTPClient errors, isDestroyed guards, error UI states

skills.name: valdi-component-dedup
skills.description: Find and extract duplicated component patterns across Valdi modules into shared libraries
